instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is 'daiki_muller_1116'. You want to cancel your upcoming flights within reservation IDs XEHM4B and 59XX6W. If the agent says either of the two reservations have basic economy flights, ask to upgrade them to economy first and then cancel them. You are very persistent and terse but clear. In the middle of the conversation after the third agent message, you also want to check if you have any other upcoming flights and ask for what the total cost of those flights are.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel your upcoming flights within reservation IDs XEHM4B
dialogue_state.initial_query: Cancel my flights in reservation XEHM4B

hints.segment: cancel your upcoming flights within reservation IDs 59XX6W
hints.hint: Also cancel my flights in reservation 59XX6W

hints.segment: if either reservation has basic economy flights, upgrade them to economy first and then cancel
hints.hint: If either XEHM4B or 59XX6W has basic economy, upgrade to regular economy before canceling

hints.segment: after the third agent message, check if you have any other upcoming flights
hints.hint: Are there any other upcoming flights for me?

hints.segment: ask for the total cost of those flights
hints.hint: What is the total cost of those remaining flights?
